name: WebProbe Differ
description: Cross-run diffing and trending module for webprobe. Compares two Run snapshots to detect changes in site structure (nodes/edges), HTTP status codes, response timings, broken links, and authentication boundary violations.

functions.name: load_run
functions.description: Load a Run object from a run directory by reading and parsing report.json

error_cases.name: missing_report_file
error_cases.condition: report.json does not exist in run_dir

error_cases.name: validation_error
error_cases.condition: JSON does not match Run model schema

preconditions: run_dir must be a valid Path object
postconditions: Returns a validated Run object parsed from report.json

structured_side_effects.description: Reads report.json file to load Run data

functions.name: diff_runs
functions.description: Compare two Run objects and produce a comprehensive RunDiff showing all structural and content changes including nodes, edges, HTTP status changes, timing changes (>20% threshold), broken link changes, and auth violation changes

error_cases.name: index_error
error_cases.condition: Node has empty captures list when accessing captures[0]

error_cases.name: zero_division
error_cases.condition: t_a.duration_ms is exactly 0 (should not occur due to guard, but possible in edge case)

preconditions: Both runs must have valid graph objects with nodes and edges
run_a and run_b must be valid Run objects
postconditions: Returns RunDiff with all detected changes
nodes_added contains sorted list of new node IDs in run_b
nodes_removed contains sorted list of node IDs removed from run_a
edges_added/edges_removed are sorted by (source, target) tuple
status_changes only includes nodes present in both runs with different HTTP status codes
timing_changes only includes nodes with >20% duration_ms delta where t_a.duration_ms > 0
new_broken_links/resolved_broken_links are sorted by (source, target) tuple

invariants: Timing change threshold is fixed at 20% (0.20)
Edge identity is determined by (source, target) tuple
BrokenLink identity is determined by (source, target) tuple
AuthBoundaryViolation identity is determined by url field
All diff lists are sorted for deterministic output
Status comparison uses first capture (index 0) when available
Delta percentage for timing is rounded to 1 decimal place

data_access.rationale: load_run reads report.json from filesystem; diff_runs performs pure in-memory computation
